{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318144785241A73CA1FC313C680"}"},"total":1844},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7595013238768649022","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"确实了，非常洁，安心看吧！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768357358,"group_id":"7502006474890038296","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"204971569581696"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502006474890038296","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"264"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":22636,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7594972515375465278","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得非常好，只有一个疑问。我记得每个世界都是有原女主的，所以男主是洁的吧，就是从内到外，前世今生，肉体灵魂都洁那种。末世这个世界作者回复别人说男主经过前几个世界灵魂为女主倾倒，没直接说他干不干净。因为我是隔了很长一段时间才回来接着看，所以不记得之前作者有没有说过这个问题[吃瓜]不得不说作者文写得好，感情戏啥的特别好磕"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768349062,"group_id":"7502006474890038296","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"男洁","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3MraU8KghquzDoKIRgenPE=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/50bd4365f0d14d28abf0a00ad5141c7e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793676&x-signature=mXm04XTjJVXUXsufuCGDR%2FToJ%2BE%3D","user_id":"204971569581696","user_name":"谜骨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"204971569581696","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502006474890038296","book_info":{"abstract":"原书名《女配一心求死，反被疯批强制》
【快穿＋双洁＋性欲强＋1v1＋病娇＋强制爱】
舒窈意外被系统绑定，扮演恶毒女配。
只要按照剧情不断发疯作死，就能完成任务，可是剧情变得越来越不可控！
世界一：疯批病娇质子x受宠骄纵公主
漆黑的夜，舒窈玉足轻挑，狠狠踩向男人染血的胸膛。
“跪下！肮脏的疯狗！”
话音刚落，脚背覆上一层冰凉湿润的触觉。
男人低垂着头颅，神情虔诚庄重。
“奴低贱不堪，愿公主垂怜。”
后来，朝野动荡，国破家亡。
乌泱泱的敌军中走出一道熟悉又可怕的身影。
男人银色的盔甲被血染得通红，阴戾的眼神恨不得吞食她的骨头。
“别来无恙，公主殿下。”
舒窈闭上眼睛，等待属于自己的命定结局——死亡。
谁料下一秒，众目睽睽之下，疯狗抵住她，将她压在先皇先祖的牌位上。
“奴怎么舍得让您死呢。”
此后，宫里多了一座名为锁金雀的宫殿，日夜烛火摇曳。
世界二：身娇体弱知青x固执偏执糙汉
城里知青太娇气，拿不动锄头下不了地。
为了偷懒，舒窈蓄意接近全村最有力的糙汉。
糙汉话很少，独独将娇气知青宠到骨子里。
后来知青劈腿私奔，糙汉气疯！
世界三：美丽东方女人x异国顶级暴徒
来自异国的凶蛮野兽，爱上一朵脆弱堪折的娇花。
可娇花带毒，还不安分，折断了才好。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7ca3fd842efc85efc8f58042b10b8636","author":"一个小莹","author_id":"","book_id":"7502006474890038296","book_name":"谁要抢男人？我都是被抢","book_short_name":"在他掌心沦陷","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0b8b8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":83,"name":"公主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=83&name=公主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7502006852582916632","read_count":"92118","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1082759"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"529","tags":"快穿,古代言情,系统,公主,病娇,1v1","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/919abbfa87d943c905fa5026d47e4af0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444887&x-signature=TTRStLxksud9054AtgGPGiSB%2Bps%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2999921986242877","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"254"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318144785241A73CA1FC313C680"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":20,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21401,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6444},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1768349220,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7510970667985208126","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者宝宝你到底给我下了什么药[哭]真的真的好喜欢你写的快穿，本来想重刷你上一部快穿（上一本美艳“小妈”真的很好看）的结果发现你出新书了[害羞]真的真的好惊喜好幸福。
女主恶毒又有三观，就感觉超可爱。本人双洁党真的看得很快哉快哉。
推荐喜欢这种类型书的宝宝们可以去看看作者其他的作品真的超好看！真的！[爱心][爱心][爱心][盯]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748788456,"group_id":"7502006474890038296","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5iok0u0Fq1rTiJGKXrGdKs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"106831092724","user_name":"用户10683109"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106831092724","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7502006474890038296","book_info":{"abstract":"原书名《女配一心求死，反被疯批强制》
